items.title: Claude Sonnet 5 costs $2 per 1M input tokens and $10 per 1M output tokens through August 31, after which prices rise to $3 and $15, respectively (Zac Hall/9to5Mac)
items.title_original: Claude Sonnet 5 costs $2 per 1M input tokens and $10 per 1M output tokens through August 31, after which prices rise to $3 and $15, respectively (Zac Hall/9to5Mac)

items.title_zh: 截至 8 月 31 日，Claude Sonnet 5 每 100 萬個輸入代幣的成本為 2 美元，每 100 萬個輸出代幣的成本為 10 美元，此後價格分別升至 3 美元和 15 美元（Zac Hall/9to5Mac）

items.title: A study of 22K US companies shows those spending most heavily on AI are adding workers faster than peers, but most gains are among tech companies and startups (Financial Times)
items.title_original: A study of 22K US companies shows those spending most heavily on AI are adding workers faster than peers, but most gains are among tech companies and startups (Financial Times)
items.title_en: A study of 22K US companies shows those spending most heavily on AI are adding workers faster than peers, but most gains are among tech companies and startups (Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 一項針對 22,000 家美國公司的研究表明，那些在人工智慧上投入最多的公司增加員工的速度比同行更快，但大部分收益來自科技公司和新創公司（《金融時報》）
items.title_bilingual: 一項針對 22,000 家美國公司的研究表明，那些在人工智慧上投入最多的公司增加員工的速度比同行更快，但大部分收益來自科技公司和新創公司（《金融時報》） / A study of 22K US companies shows those spending most heavily on AI are adding workers faster than peers, but most gains are among tech companies and startups (Financial Times)

items.title: Sources: AI video startup Higgsfield is in talks to raise $300M to $500M at a $5B pre-money valuation, more than 4x its valuation in a January 2026 round (The Information)
items.title_original: Sources: AI video startup Higgsfield is in talks to raise $300M to $500M at a $5B pre-money valuation, more than 4x its valuation in a January 2026 round (The Information)

items.title_zh: 資料來源：人工智慧視訊新創公司 Higgsfield 正在洽談以 50 億美元的投前估值籌集 3 億至 5 億美元資金，該估值是 2026 年 1 月融資輪估值的 4 倍多（The Information）
